blocks.text: Barcelona, Liverpool, and the CS2 Grand Final — Saturday delivers everything
Atlético Madrid also play tonight at Oviedo while Real Madrid wait until Monday at home. A clinical Barcelona win here applies maximum pressure — this could be a La Liga turning point.

blocks.label: 🎮 DraculaN Season 5 — Grand Final Day
items: 🎮 14:00 — FlyQuest vs 100 Thieves — elimination: only the winner advances to the Final
🎮 18:30 — HEROIC vs Grand Final winner — championship decider
